description: Flix is the technology organization behind the Flix travel network, which powers booking, network planning, pricing, and customer-facing digital products for bus and rail services. The flix.tech domain primarily appears to host corporate and internal/open-source related content rather than public developer APIs.
summary: Flix.tech exposes one public MCP server endpoint at https://mcp-gpt.dist.flix.tech/mcp with no authentication required; no public HTTP/REST, GraphQL, or CLI integration surfaces were found on the domain.
